message:
feat(tools): add hashline output mode to GrepTool

Add `hashline` boolean parameter to GrepTool that outputs lines in
N#AB format (line number + content hash) compatible with hashline_edit.
This extends the hashline editing workflow to grep results, allowing
users to search and then precisely edit matched lines.

Includes diff_parts join refactor and formatting cleanups from
concurrent agent work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
